avatar_faq_items.q: What size should my avatar be?
avatar_faq_items.a: The generated image works at any size. Most platforms accept square images — 400×400px or larger is recommended for sharp display.

avatar_faq_items.q: Can I get a transparent background?
avatar_faq_items.a: Yes. Select "transparent background" before generating to get a PNG with no background, perfect for overlaying on custom profile banners.

avatar_faq_items.q: Can I make matching avatars for friends?
avatar_faq_items.a: Absolutely. Generate multiple chibi avatars with similar styles, matching outfits, or complementary color schemes for group profiles.

avatar_faq_items.q: How is this different from generic avatar makers?
avatar_faq_items.a: Generic avatar makers use preset templates with limited customization. Our AI chibi maker creates unique, fully custom characters based on your specific description or photo — no two results are the same.

avatar.title: Chibi Avatar Maker
avatar.hero_subtitle: Create a cute chibi avatar for your social media profiles, gaming accounts, or messaging apps. Describe your ideal character or upload a photo, and get a kawaii anime-style profile picture ready to use anywhere.
avatar.prompt_placeholder: Girl with short pink hair, glasses, cat hoodie, cute profile picture, simple pastel background
avatar.prompt_default: A cute chibi profile avatar with expressive eyes, clean centered composition, simple pastel background
avatar.photo_help: Optional. Upload a selfie to make the avatar look like you.
avatar.style_help: Kawaii Soft is ideal for profile pictures and social avatars.
avatar.result_desc: Download your cute anime profile picture and use it anywhere.
avatar.inspiration_desc: Avatar ideas to get you started
avatar.why_body: Chibi avatars stand out in crowded feeds. The exaggerated cuteness — big eyes, tiny body, expressive face — grabs attention and makes your profile instantly recognizable. Unlike generic avatar makers, chibi style adds personality and charm that feels uniquely yours.
avatar.how_title: How to Make Your Chibi Avatar
avatar.step1_body: Type a character description or upload a reference photo.
avatar.step2_body: Choose Classic Chibi for bold anime style, or Kawaii Soft for gentler pastel tones.
avatar.step3_body: Your avatar is ready in seconds.
avatar.step4_body: Save as PNG with transparent or colored background. Resize for any platform.
avatar_examples.title: Chibi Avatar Examples
avatar_examples.description: Browse cute chibi avatars created by our AI for inspiration.
avatar_perfect_for.title: Perfect For
avatar_perfect_for.description: Use your chibi avatar across all your favorite platforms and communities.
avatar_perfect_for.item1_body: A recognizable, cute avatar that stands out in chat and streams.
avatar_perfect_for.item2_body: Personalize your Steam, Xbox, PlayStation, or Nintendo profile with kawaii art.
avatar_perfect_for.item3_body: Update your X, Instagram, or TikTok profile with a fresh chibi look.
avatar_ideas.title: Avatar Ideas
avatar_ideas.description: Get inspired with these popular chibi avatar concepts.
avatar_ideas.item1_body: Cat ears, fox ears, or bunny ears add an extra layer of cuteness.
avatar_ideas.item2_body: Elven ears, magical accessories, or glowing eyes for a mystical vibe.
avatar_ideas.item3_body: Dress your chibi in cozy winter sweaters or breezy summer looks.
